title: ruvnet/RuView
summary: RuView explores WiFi-based sensing for spatial intelligence and health monitoring, expanding AI use cases beyond vision-based systems.
content:
RuView explores WiFi-based sensing for spatial intelligence and health monitoring, expanding AI use cases beyond vision-based systems.
Highlights:
- 4963 stars this week
- WiFi-based sensing
- No camera required
- Use cases: presence and vital signs
